untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external data not in allowed indicators: (1) Inventory levels and percentile distributions (not available in price/technical indicators), (2) Storage costs and sector median comparisons (fundamental data not in allowed set), (3) YoY demand growth metrics (macroeconomic data not available). The rule is fundamentally about commodity-specific supply/demand dynamics and cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-action and technical indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios).
translation_notes: This signal requires specialized commodity market data (inventory levels, storage costs, demand growth) that are not derivable from standard OHLCV technical indicators. It would require data connectors to commodity-specific APIs (e.g., EIA inventory reports, futures term structure for storage costs, macroeconomic demand indices). The volatility component could be partially captured using hvol_20 or atr_14 for HIGH_VOL regime confirmation, but the core trigger conditions cannot be expressed without inventory and cost-basis data.
